entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop for which improved cultivars are being adopted

entities.name: ADOPTION
entities.description: The process of farmers implementing improved crop cultivars in their fields

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The scientific process used to develop improved crop cultivars

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area, which increases with adoption

entities.name: QUALITY
entities.description: The characteristics of the crop that are improved through adoption

entities.name: UNIT COST OF PRODUCTION
entities.description: The cost associated with producing one unit of the crop

entities.name: PRODUCTION RISKS
entities.description: The uncertainties and potential losses associated with crop production

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The international research organization that develops and networks sorghum cultivars

entities.name: FARM HOUSEHOLDS
entities.description: The social and economic units that adopt improved cultivars and experience the impacts

relationships.description: Adoption is measured for improved cultivars of this crop
Plant breeding is a precondition for the adoption of improved cultivars
Adoption of improved cultivars creates favorable impacts on these units

Adoption can lead to improvement in this trait

Adoption can lead to a reduction in these risks
